creator: freebsd@coombscloud.com
text:
Created attachment 196090
emulators/emulationstation: initial port (v2.7.1)

EmulationStation is a cross-platform graphical front-end for emulators, with controller-based navigation. The original project[1] has not seen updates since 2015. However, it is the frontend used by the popular RetroPi project; this is an actively-maintaned fork[2] from RetroPie.

* New port, release v2.7.1.
  - Includes patches to fix compiler errors on FreeBSD due to missing includes of <string>
  - Includes patch to use POSIX sleep function instead of Windows sleep function
  - Includes patch to use pugixml from ports tree, rather than embedded.

portlint -AC: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 11.2-amd64)

[1] https://github.com/Aloshi/EmulationStation/
[2] https://github.com/RetroPie/EmulationStation/
